name: Prof. Aishwarya Mane
description:
Experienced educator with 10+ years of teaching Mathematics and Science for Classes 8th–10th (SSC & CBSE, English Medium).
Also specializes in Mathematics for Classes 11th & 12th, focusing on strong concepts and exam success.
Known for clear explanations, structured practice, and consistent results.
